notableEvents.label: Cam Smith reached on error

notableEvents.label: Nick Allen GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Allen grounds into a double play, pitcher Sam Haggerty to second baseman Justin Foscue to first baseman Jake Burger. Brice Matthews out at 2nd. Nick Allen out at 1st.
